column1: Dynamic Cables Ltd. is a manufacturer of power infra cables that includes LT, HT, EHVC, Power control & instrumentation cables, flexible & industrial cables, solar cables and railway signaling cables. It supplies cables to Government Discom, Private Distribution companies, Private EPC contractors, industrial and Export clients. Co. has 3 manufacturing plants situated at Jaipur and Reengus. Business operations are managed through a corporate office in Jaipur and 5 regional sales offices across India. [1]
